settings.general.port_title: Port the service listens on. Changing this will restart the service.
settings.general.port_help: Changing the port will restart the service automatically.
settings.general.auth_help: Enable or disable authentication for the dashboard.

settings.general.theme_help: Default theme for new users. Users can override in their profile.

settings.binaries.description: Configure the paths to external tools required by the conversion engine. Detected paths are pre-filled automatically.
settings.binaries.not_found: Not found – enter the full path
banner.missing_binaries: Required binaries are missing. Go to Settings > Binary Paths to configure them. Jobs will fail until all paths are set.

settings.media.dest_placeholder: Leave empty to write next to source
settings.media.dest_choose_title: Browse and choose a default destination.
settings.media.preset_title: Default preset applied to all new jobs. Leave empty to use codec/speed defaults.
settings.media.delete_title: Remove the original file after a successful conversion.
settings.media.force_title: Convert even if the file already matches the target codec.
settings.media.verbose_title: Show detailed FFmpeg output in logs.
settings.smtp.title: SMTP Settings
settings.smtp.tls_help: Port 465 uses implicit SSL automatically. STARTTLS applies to port 587 and others.

settings.notifications.channels_help: Configure where Clutch sends notifications when jobs finish.
settings.notifications.bot_token_help: Create a bot via @BotFather and paste the token here.
settings.notifications.chat_id_help: The chat, group, or channel ID where messages will be sent.
settings.notifications.headers_help: Optional JSON object with custom HTTP headers.

upload.title: Upload & Convert
upload.description: Upload video files from your device to the server for conversion.
upload.filter_help: Glob pattern to filter files. Leave empty for all video files.
settings.general.upload_dir_title: Absolute path where uploaded files are stored.
settings.general.upload_dir_help: Absolute path on the server where uploaded files are stored. Leave empty to disable uploads.
settings.general.max_upload_title: Maximum file size for uploads in MB. 0 = unlimited.
settings.general.max_upload_help: Maximum upload file size in megabytes. Set to 0 for no limit.
settings.presets.title: Encoding Presets
settings.presets.intro: Browse the official HandBrake presets and create your own. Mark a custom preset as quick-access to make it appear in the codec dropdown when submitting jobs.
settings.presets.dragons_body: The developer spent a lot of time crafting simple codec/speed options so you wouldn't need to tinker with presets. These are here if you want full control, but expect trial and error — encode a test file, check the size, and verify it looks good on your TV. The built-in codec options cannot be deleted, so you always have a safety net to fall back on.
settings.presets.official_help: Click a preset to clone it as a starting point for a new custom preset.
settings.presets.no_custom: You have not created any custom presets yet.
settings.presets.wizard.title: Create preset
settings.presets.wizard.choose_source: How do you want to start?
settings.presets.wizard.pick_codec: Pick a codec to start from:
settings.presets.new_from_codec_title: Create a preset pre-configured with a built-in codec.
settings.presets.field.name: Name
settings.presets.field.name_help: A short, unique name shown in dropdowns.
settings.presets.field.description_help: A short note about what this preset is good for (genre, device, source quality…).
settings.presets.field.quick_access_chec: Show in the codec dropdown when submitting jobs
settings.presets.field.quick_access_help: Useful when you want a one-click preset for everyday encodes.
settings.presets.field.base_preset_help: The official HandBrake preset this one was cloned from. Empty for fully custom presets.
settings.presets.field.encoder_help: Which video encoder to use. NVENC and QSV use hardware acceleration; x264/x265 use the CPU and produce smaller files.
settings.presets.field.quality_mode_help: Constant quality keeps a target perceptual quality at the cost of unpredictable file size; average bitrate targets a fixed kbps.
settings.presets.field.quality_value_hel: For CRF, lower is better quality (typical: 18–28). For ABR, this is the target bitrate in kbps.
settings.presets.field.encoder_preset_he: Encoder-specific speed preset. x264/x265 accept ultrafast→placebo. NVENC accepts p1 (fast) → p7 (best). Leave empty for the encoder default.
settings.presets.field.max_width_help: Cap output width in pixels. 0 keeps the source resolution.
settings.presets.field.max_height_help: Cap output height in pixels. 0 keeps the source resolution.
settings.presets.field.framerate_help: Same-as-source is usually best. Peak caps fluctuating sources; constant forces a fixed frame rate.
settings.presets.field.extra_options_hel: Passed verbatim to --encopts. Only set if you know the encoder syntax.
settings.presets.field.audio_mode_help: Passthrough keeps audio bit-identical (great for surround/HD audio). Re-encode shrinks the file; the chosen encoder applies.
settings.presets.field.audio_encoder_hel: Used when re-encoding or as the fallback for copy mode.
settings.presets.field.audio_bitrate_hel: 0 lets the encoder pick a sensible default per track.
settings.presets.field.audio_mixdown_hel: Auto picks a mixdown matching the source channel count.
settings.presets.field.container_format_: MKV supports more codecs and unlimited subtitles. MP4 is the most compatible with mobile players.
settings.presets.field.deinterlace_help: Removes interlacing artifacts from old TV captures. Off if your source is already progressive.
settings.presets.field.denoise_help: Reduces grain. Stronger settings can wash out fine detail.
jobs.preset_title: Use a saved preset instead of the simple codec/speed options.
jobs.preset_help: Pick a preset to apply its full HandBrake configuration. Manage presets in Settings → Presets.
watchers.preset_title: Use a saved preset instead of the simple codec/speed options.
watchers.preset_help: When set, the codec and encode speed below are ignored.
